name: Fabulous Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a 4-cup Pyrex measuring cup or tall-sided microwave-safe container.
2. Whisk together until thoroughly mixed and no lumps remain.
3. Add 1/2 cup + 3 tablespoons boiling water to the dry ingredients.
4. Whisk until smooth.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes, stirring halfway through. Be careful; it may boil up but should not overflow.
6. Remove from microwave and stir in vanilla.
7. Serve.
